name: Larrainvial Asset Management SICAV - Fondo de Inversion LarrainVial Deuda Local
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management SICAV - Fondo de Inversion LarrainVial Deuda Local invests in local debt markets. Larrainvial Asset Management SICAV manages the fund. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of debt securities from local issuers, aiming to generate income and capital appreciation.
